heading: Omitted
label: 1427 to 1431 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 1427 to 1431 were omitted in the general revision of the United States Housing Act of 1937 by , , .Pub. L. 93–383, title II, § 201(a)88 Stat. 653Aug. 22, 1974Section 1427, , formerly § 27, , renumbered , title III, § 307(h), , provided for application of provisions when conflicting with other laws relating to housing or slum clearance.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 896, § 2850 Stat. 899July 15, 1949, ch. 33863 Stat. 431Section 1428, , formerly § 28, , renumbered , title III, § 307(h), , made available funds for the District of Columbia.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 896, § 2950 Stat. 899July 15, 1949, ch. 33863 Stat. 431Section 1429, , formerly § 29, , renumbered , title III, § 307(h), , provided for separability of provisions.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 896, § 3050 Stat. 899July 15, 1949, ch. 33863 Stat. 431Section 1430, , formerly § 30, , renumbered , title III, § 307(h), , set forth short title of provisions as “United States Housing Act of 1937”. See section 1 of act , as added by , set out as a Short Title note under .act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 896, § 3150 Stat. 899July 15, 1949, ch. 33863 Stat. 431section 201(a) of Pub. L. 93–383section 1437 of this titleSept. 1, 1937Section 1431, , , , which provided that the necessary expenses of providing representatives at sites of non-Federal projects in connection with construction of these projects by public housing agencies with aid under this chapter, be compensated by these agencies by payments of fixed fees, was from the Independent Offices and Department of Housing and Urban Development Appropriations Act, 1971, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts. Similar provisions were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:Pub. L. 91–556, title IV84 Stat. 1463Dec. 17, 1970, , .Nov. 26, 1969Pub.
